form.formComment: Missed the frame latest (22.30) when fifth over 390m at this track in a Mix 3/4. Has four wins and nine placings from 14 starts from the draw. Looks a leading chance.

form.formComment: Strong performance to win by half a length at Warrnambool over 390m (22.46) beating Xisan Bale in Grade 5 on April 2. Looks the one to beat again.

formComments.comment: Strong performance to win by half a length at Warrnambool over 390m (22.46) beating Xisan Bale in Grade 5 on April 2. Looks the one to beat again.

form.formComment: Solid performance after racing just off the speed to win by a long neck at this track over 390m (22.35) beating Chatter Beast in Grade 5 on March 30. Prefer to watch at this stage.

form.formComment: Good effort last time when second (22.38) over 390m at this track. Squeeze draw to overcome. Deserves respect.

formComments.comment: Good effort last time when second (22.38) over 390m at this track. Squeeze draw to overcome. Deserves respect.

form.formComment: Started big odds last time but hit the ground running with a slick early split, giving a sight but fading out of it to finish sixth (23.68) at Horsham over 410m. Has run slick time here with a 22.26 PB at the distance. Go close.

form.formComment: Form has been good with a placing two starts ago and a win three runs back. Last time out finished 2nd on April 5 over 435m at Sale behind Dr. Erica beaten 1.5 lengths (24.71) in a Grade 5. Looking to others this time.

form.formComment: Latest effort finished last over 390m at Shepparton beaten 8 lengths (22.74) behind Starship Atlas in a Grade 5 H on March 30. Can bounce back. One of the main chances.

form.formComment: Won two starts back when well in the market at Shepparton over 390m. Last start finished 2nd in a Grade 5 on April 2 over 390m at Warrnambool behind Mischief Mate beaten 6 lengths (22.81). In form and another win would not surprise.
